title: styrax formosanus var. formosanus
intro: Styrax formosanus var. formosanus, also known as Formosan styrax or Taiwan styrax, is a type of plant that belongs to the Storax family. The resin extracted from this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with Styrax formosanus var. formosanus include wound healing, pain relief, and antimicrobial effects, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. The resin can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally under medical supervision.
